title: Bedtime Story for Kids | Kids Cartoon #shorts
description:
HUSH WHOOSH! A moonbeam taps Benny's pillow!
Enjoy a calm bedtime story for kids with Benny, stars, and a sleepy pillow.
Little listeners practice gentle counting, breathing, and cozy bedtime words.
Kid-safe cartoon story for ages 2-8 in American English.
#shorts #kidssongs #preschool #toddler
